admin.support.arch.actionLiveBody: Keep the queue moving by using chat for lightweight follow-up while voice and video handle the trust-critical moments.
admin.support.arch.actionReplyBody: Fastest acceleration right now is clearing text backlog so live calls stay reserved for the issues that truly need real-time handling.

admin.support.arch.actionStableTitle: Queue is stable and ready to accelerate
admin.support.arch.actionUrgentBody: Moderation and high-trust issues should move through a tight chat-to-call path so the resolution notes stay durable after the live interaction ends.

admin.support.status.lastFinished: The last {label} finished. Start another one if real-time handling is still needed.
admin.support.status.pollingFallback: Ticket updates are on polling fallback, but the live call itself can still run over LiveKit.
admin.support.status.reconnecting: Ticket updates are reconnecting now. LiveKit calls can stay active while the socket recovers.
admin.support.status.rejoin: A {label} is already open for this ticket. Rejoin it from here.

admin.users.actions.deleteDisabledTitle: Delete is not available for already deleted accounts
admin.users.actions.deleteTitle: Soft-delete the account and start the recovery trail
admin.users.actions.dismissDisabledTitle: Dismiss Warning is only available while the user is in warned state
admin.users.actions.dismissTitle: Dismiss an active warning and resolve the warning case
admin.users.actions.reactivateDisabledTi: Reactivate is only available for suspended users
admin.users.actions.reactivateTitle: Lift an active suspension and resolve the case
admin.users.actions.suspendDisabledTitle: Suspend is only available for non-deleted users who are not already suspended
admin.users.actions.suspendTitle: Suspend access and open an urgent appeal case
admin.users.actions.warnDisabledTitle: Warn is only available for active or warned users
admin.users.actions.warnTitle: Issue a formal warning and open an appeal case
admin.users.copy.appealCase: For warnings and suspensions, Aura now opens a real moderation support case so the user can appeal and the admin team can resolve it in one thread.
admin.users.copy.auditLog: Every governance action writes an audit log, creates a user-facing signal, and records who acted.
admin.users.copy.currentState: The selected user is currently in {state} state.
admin.users.copy.reactivation: Reactivation and warning dismissal close the matching moderation case with a clear resolution message. Deletion creates a recovery trail, but the final user recovery path is support-led because deleted users cannot keep normal app access.
admin.users.description: Warn, suspend, reactivate, and soft-delete users from a premium moderation surface with strong audit visibility.
admin.users.explainer.delete.adminPower: Soft-deletes the account, disables seller activity, optionally scrubs PII, and records a recovery trail.
admin.users.explainer.delete.resolution: Recovery is handled through support email and the internal moderation case, not casual in-app reversal.
admin.users.explainer.delete.userImpact: The user loses normal app access and must go through recovery support if this was a mistake.
admin.users.explainer.dismiss.adminPower: Clears a warning and restores the account to active without suspension.
admin.users.explainer.dismiss.resolution: The moderation case is marked resolved and stays in the audit timeline.
admin.users.explainer.dismiss.userImpact: The user sees that the warning was reviewed fairly and removed.
admin.users.explainer.reactivate.adminPo: Ends an active suspension and restores the account to working state.
admin.users.explainer.reactivate.resolut: The open suspension appeal is resolved and the outcome is attached to the same case.
admin.users.explainer.reactivate.userImp: The user gets a clear recovery moment and can resume normal account usage.
admin.users.explainer.suspend.adminPower: Temporarily blocks the account, disables seller mode, expires active listings, and opens an urgent appeal case.
admin.users.explainer.suspend.resolution: Admin reactivates the account after review, which closes the suspension case with a recorded outcome.
admin.users.explainer.suspend.userImpact: The user immediately feels the restriction because access-sensitive actions stop working and the case becomes urgent.
admin.users.explainer.warn.adminPower: Records a formal policy warning, notifies the user, and opens a moderation appeal case.
admin.users.explainer.warn.resolution: Admin or support can review the appeal in Support, then dismiss the warning if justified.
admin.users.explainer.warn.userImpact: The user keeps access, but clearly sees that trust & safety is watching the account.
admin.users.footer.auditLogging: Admin controls are enforced server-side with strict audit logging.

admin.users.timeline.title: Governance Timeline

login.error.passwordUppercase: Password must contain an uppercase letter

login.info.forgot.dual: Enter your registered email and phone number, then verify recovery with one code to email and one Firebase SMS code to your phone.
login.info.forgot.fallback: Firebase phone delivery is unavailable on this deployment, so secure backup OTP codes will be sent through the available secure verification channel before password reset.
login.info.forgot.single: Enter your registered email and phone number. We'll verify both before allowing a new password.
login.info.forgot.title: RESET PASSWORD
login.info.otp.default: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email{extra}.
login.info.otp.email.forgot: Step 1 of 2. Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email, then finish recovery with Firebase SMS on your phone.
login.info.otp.email.signin: Step 1 of 2. Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email, then finish the same sign-in with Firebase SMS on your phone.

login.info.otp.phone.signin: Step 2 of 2. Enter the Firebase SMS code sent to your phone to complete secure sign-in.

login.social.enablePrefix: Use email and OTP sign-in here. To enable Google, Facebook, GitHub, and X, authorize

login.social.runtimeBlockedSuffix: in this tab. Refresh after confirming the domain is authorized, or continue with email and OTP now.

login.social.unavailableBody: Firebase authentication did not initialize cleanly for this frontend build. Email and OTP sign-in remain available.
login.trust.forgot.1dual: Recovery checks your email first, then requires Firebase phone verification before password reset.
login.trust.forgot.1fallback: Firebase phone delivery is unavailable here, so Aura is using secure backup delivery through the available verification channel before recovery continues.
login.trust.forgot.1single: Reset requests stay tied to your registered email and phone.
login.trust.forgot.2: A fresh verification chain is required before any password recovery step.
login.trust.forgot.3: Suspicious recovery attempts are rate-limited automatically.
login.trust.otp.default.1: Codes expire in 5 minutes and can be used only once.
login.trust.otp.default.2: Aura never asks for your OTP outside this secure verification step.
login.trust.otp.default.3: Retry and resend controls stay available if delivery is delayed.
login.trust.otp.email.2: Step 2 will still require the Firebase phone code before this flow is finalized.
login.trust.otp.email.3: Both codes expire quickly and each resend refreshes the full secure verification chain.
login.trust.otp.email.forgot: Step 1 verifies the registered recovery email for this account.
login.trust.otp.email.signin: Step 1 checks the email address tied to your password and registered phone number.
login.trust.otp.email.signup: Step 1 verifies the email address that will own the new account.
login.trust.otp.phone.2: The final Firebase SMS confirmation binds this flow to your registered phone.
login.trust.otp.phone.3: If the phone code expires, resend refreshes both email and phone factors together.
login.trust.otp.phone.forgot: Your recovery email step is already verified for this account.
login.trust.otp.phone.signin: Your email step is already verified for this login attempt.
login.trust.otp.phone.signup: Your email step is already verified for this new account.
login.trust.reset.1: This password change is allowed only after verified recovery for the same email and phone.
login.trust.reset.2: Your new password must meet the full strength policy before it is saved.
login.trust.reset.3: Existing Firebase sessions are revoked after the reset so the new password takes effect cleanly.
login.trust.signin.1dual: Password is verified first, then login codes are sent to both your email and Firebase phone channel.
login.trust.signin.1fallback: Firebase phone verification is unavailable here, so Aura is using secure backup delivery through the available verification channel.
login.trust.signin.1single: Password validity is checked before an OTP is issued.
login.trust.signin.2: Phone confirmation reduces account-takeover risk before the session is finalized.
login.trust.signin.3: Rate limits, device checks, and audit logs guard repeated attempts.
login.trust.signup.1dual: Email is checked first, then Firebase phone verification finishes the new account securely.
login.trust.signup.1fallback: Firebase phone delivery is unavailable here, so Aura is using secure backup delivery through the available verification channel before account creation.
login.trust.signup.1single: Email and phone are verified before a new account becomes active.
login.trust.signup.2: Seller, payment, and order access stay locked behind verified identity.
login.trust.signup.3: Fraud checks and duplicate-account controls run before activation.

profile.settings.security.recoveryCodesB: Generate one-time backup codes so a passkey account has a recovery path that still stays server-gated and single-use.
profile.settings.security.recoveryCodesE: This account has passkey protection but no backup codes yet. Generate them after a fresh passkey checkpoint.
profile.settings.security.recoveryCodesP: Add a passkey first. Backup recovery codes are only available after the account has hardware-backed authentication.
profile.settings.security.recoveryCodesS: These codes are not stored in readable form after this moment. Each one works only once.

profile.support.arch.defaultBody: Aura Support can move this same thread into voice or video without losing the written history or the resolution summary.
profile.support.arch.defaultTitle: Start in chat and accelerate when needed
profile.support.arch.description: Move from written support into live voice or video without losing history, status, or the eventual resolution.
profile.support.arch.joinBody: Join the live lane from this thread and the chat history stays right here after the call.
profile.support.arch.liveLanesBody: {connected} live calls are already connected across your support threads.
profile.support.arch.replyBody: Reply in chat first, then escalate to voice or video only if the issue still needs real-time handling.
profile.support.arch.replyNeededBody: {count} threads have unread support replies for you.
profile.support.arch.replyTitle: {count} support threads are waiting on you
profile.support.arch.requestedBody: Stay in this chat while the support team prepares the call so no context gets lost.
profile.support.arch.resolvedBody: Keep this thread as the durable record. Open a fresh one only if the issue truly changes.
profile.support.arch.threadsBody: {open} conversations are still open for follow-up.
profile.support.arch.title: Chat, voice, and video stay in one support thread
profile.support.arch.voiceLanesBody: {video} video escalations can happen without losing the chat trail.
profile.support.call.status.active: Aura Support is already ringing or connected on this {label}.
profile.support.call.status.default: Move this thread into a real-time voice or video call when typing is too slow.
profile.support.call.status.ended: The last {label} finished. Request another one if text support is still not enough.
profile.support.call.status.joinable: Aura Support already opened a {label} for this ticket. Join it from here.
profile.support.call.status.queued: Your {label} request is queued for the support team.

profile.support.closedNotice: This chat is closed. If the issue is still active, open a new thread so the next action is tracked cleanly.
profile.support.compose.appealBody: Governance-related actions route through this thread so you can contest or clarify the decision in one place.
profile.support.compose.body: This thread stays visible to you and Aura Support until the issue is actually resolved.
profile.support.compose.chooseLaneBody: Pick the chat type that best matches the issue.
profile.support.compose.messagePlacehold: Describe the problem, what action was taken, and what kind of resolution you need.
profile.support.compose.persistentNote: This thread is persistent. Replies, policy notes, and next steps stay together like a real chat history.

profile.support.compose.subject: Subject
profile.support.compose.supportFallbackB: Open a thread and let Aura Support respond in the same conversation.
profile.support.compose.title: Start a support conversation
profile.support.connection.live: Realtime is connected for this thread.
profile.support.connection.polling: Realtime is on polling fallback. Aura refreshes this chat every {seconds} seconds.
profile.support.connection.reconnecting: Realtime is reconnecting for this thread.
profile.support.empty.body: Everything important lands here: text replies, resolution notes, and live support escalation.
profile.support.empty.headline: Support should feel like a real conversation

profile.support.empty.title: Pick a thread or start a new one
profile.support.error.liveCallRequest: Failed to request a live support call
profile.support.inbox.body: Appeals, order issues, and live support handoffs stay in one conversation flow.

profile.support.inbox.title: Chat with Aura Support
profile.support.thread.activeBody: This thread is the shared record for you and Aura Support. No more disconnected alerts.
profile.support.thread.body: Text support, policy notes, and live support escalation all stay in this single thread.
profile.support.thread.waitingBody: Reply in this chat to keep the support or governance action moving.
profile.support.thread.waitingTitle: Aura Support is waiting on your reply
